response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software engineering experience, including distributed systems and cloud architecture, they critically lack the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. Their background is predominantly in web and high-level backend development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than the low-level systems engineering typically required for a C++-based cloud compute platform role.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and microservices, including handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby media.
Solid experience with modern cloud and DevOps tooling, including AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.
Demonstrated commitment to mentoring and engineering best practices through organizing workshops, coding dojos, and technical courses.
concerns: Critically short on the required 8 years of C++ programming experience, with only about 7 months explicitly listed at National Instruments.
Technical background leans heavily toward full-stack and web development rather than low-level compute infrastructure and hardware architecture.
Lacks formal experience acting as a dedicated Technical Lead driving cross-team alignment on large-scale infrastructure projects.
